ns0:entry.ns0:title: 648540858/wvp-GB28181-pro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/648540858/wvp-GB28181-pro
Language: java
基于GB28181-2016、部标808、部标1078标准实现的开箱即用的网络视频平台。自带管理页面，支持NAT穿透，支持海康、大华、宇视等品牌的IPC、NVR接入。支持国标级联，支持将普通摄像机/直播流/直播推流转国标共享到国标平台。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/dd-trace-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-java
Language: java
Datadog APM client for Java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
Language: java
OpenAPI Generator allows generation of API client libraries (SDK generation), server stubs, documentation and configuration automatically given an OpenAPI Spec (v2, v3)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Snailclimb/interview-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Snailclimb/interview-guide
Language: java
基于 Spring Boot 4.1 + Java 21 + Spring AI 2.0 + PostgreSQL + pgvector + RustFS + Redis，实现简历智能分析、AI模拟面试、知识库RAG检索等核心功能。非常适合作为学习和简历项目，学习门槛低。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StarRocks/starrocks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StarRocks/starrocks
Language: java
The world's fastest open query engine for sub-second analytics both on and off the data lakehouse. With the flexibility to support nearly any scenario, StarRocks provides best-in-class performance for multi-dimensional analytics, real-time analytics, and ad-hoc queries. A Linux Foundation project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Suwayomi/Suwayomi-Server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Suwayomi/Suwayomi-Server
Language: java
A rewrite of Tachiyomi for the Desktop

Apache DolphinScheduler is the modern data orchestration platform. Agile to create high performance workflow with low-code

Language: java
The java implementation of Apache Dubbo. An RPC and microservice framework.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor
Language: java
Conductor is an event driven agentic workflow engine providing durable and highly resilient execution engine for applications and AI Agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/copilot-sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/copilot-sdk
Language: java
Multi-platform SDK for integrating GitHub Copilot Agent into apps and services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langchain4j/langchain4j
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langchain4j/langchain4j
Language: java
LangChain4j is an idiomatic, open-source Java library for building LLM-powered applications on the JVM. It offers a unified API over popular LLM providers and vector stores, and makes implementing tool calling (including MCP support), agents and RAG easy. It integrates seamlessly with enterprise Java frameworks like Quarkus and Spring Boot.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/logisim-evolution/logisim-evolution
Language: java
Digital logic design tool and simulator

Language: java

URL: https://github.com/microg/GmsCore
Language: java
Free implementation of Play Services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nageoffer/ragent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nageoffer/ragent
Language: java
企业级 Agentic RAG 智能体 - 全链路覆盖文档解析、多路检索、意图识别、问题重写、会话记忆、MCP 工具调用与深度思考。面向真实业务场景，从 0 到 1 完整工程实现。
